core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix SaaS precision with Editorial warmth.
Emotion First: Data is boring; Insights are exciting. Design for the 'Aha!' moment.
Content is King: Every pixel serves the data.
Negative Space: Use whitespace to reduce cognitive load.
Contrast: High contrast for readability and hierarchy.

rules: Overlines must be uppercase and tracking-wide.
Never center text by default; use left alignment for readability.

primary.name: Electric Indigo
primary.usage: Primary CTAs, Active States, Key Highlights

general.spacing: Generous. Use p-8, p-12 where others use p-4.
general.grid_system: Use 'Bento' grids. Avoid equal-sized boring grids.
general.container: Max-width 1400px for dashboard, full-width for marketing hero.

marketing.hero: Left-aligned strong typography, 3D/Abstract visual on right or background.

dashboard.density: High density for data tables. Use 'h-full' for widgets.
dashboard.cards: Flat or subtle border. No heavy shadows.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-md px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-all shadow-sm hover:shadow-md
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary/10 text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/20 rounded-md px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-all

cards.style: bg-card text-card-foreground border border-border/50 shadow-sm hover:border-primary/20 transition-colors
cards.dashboard_widget: flex flex-col h-full p-6 bg-surface rounded-xl border border-border/40

inputs.style: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-transparent px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

badges.style: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2

tracing_beam.description: A subtle gradient border that follows the mouse or animates continuously.

noise_texture.implementation: SVG noise overlay with low opacity (0.03).

team_work.alt: Data analysts working in modern office

accessibility.focus: Visible focus rings on all interactive elements.
accessibility.attributes: Use data-testid for all interactive elements.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the Dark/Light mode toggle immediately in the top navbar.
Ensure all dashboard charts use 'recharts' and are responsive.
Follow the 'Bento' grid layout for the main dashboard view.
Do not use generic 12-column grids everywhere; vary the span.
Apply 'data-testid' to all buttons, inputs, and links.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (e.g., transition: all).
You MUST NOT center align the app container.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠 for icons.
